description:
## Top-Level Model Registration

Register a top-level Earth system model for CMIP7.

For CMIP7, this name will become the model's **source_id**.

See the [EMD Specification](https://wcrp-cmip.github.io/Essential-Model-Documentation/) for detailed guidance.

label: Model Name
description: The name of the top-level model.\n\nThis must be an existing source_id.

label: Model Family
description: The component's family name (if applicable).\n\n<collapse>A family of models share much of their code bases, but may be configured in different ways (e.g. different resolutions, parameter choices, or the inclusion or not of particular model components). See, for instance, [Masson and Knutti (2011)](https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1029/2011GL046864) for an example of how the family can be used to inform model genealogies.</collapse> or components.

label: Scientific Description
description:
A scientific overview of the model.

**Must mention ALL component types:**
- Dynamic components: Brief high-level overview. Example: 'The model includes a global process-based model of the land surface and the terrestrial biosphere that calculates water, energy, and carbon fluxes between the surface and the atmosphere'
- Prescribed components: Explain how they are treated. Example: 'The model requires that a monthly mean, zonally averaged ozone field be prescribed because the model does not include an interactive atmospheric chemistry component'
- Omitted components: Note they are absent. Example: 'The model has no treatment of atmospheric chemistry.'
placeholder: Describe the model covering all component types (dynamic, prescribed, omitted)...

label: Dynamic Components
description:
Components that are dynamically simulated.

**At least one required.**

These must be registered separately via Model Component template.

label: Prescribed Components
description: Components represented with prescribed values (constant or time-varying inputs).\n\nLeave empty if none.

label: Omitted Components
description: Components wholly omitted from the model.\n\nLeave empty if none.

label: Calendar
description:
Calendar(s) used by the model.

**List most commonly used first.

Only the set of calendars that are adopted in CMIP7 simulations should be provided, identifying which calendar is most commonly used by listing it first.

label: Release Year
description: Year the model was released or first used for published simulations.

## References

Provide DOI URLs  to published work for the top-level model as a whole.

All DOIs must be full URLs starting with https://doi.org/

label: Reference DOIs
description: Enter DOI URLs, one per line.
## Issue Handling Metadata\n\nThese options control how the submission is processed.

label: Issue Kind
description: Select whether this is a new submission or modification of existing entry.
